details.why_it_matters: The system can resume its requested operating mode now that the triggering condition has cleared.

details.decision: Quarantine the subsystem until the next safe review window.
details.next_action: Leave the core trading pipeline online and keep reporting the quarantined state to operators.
details.operator_message: The recovery agent isolated the research_shadow subsystem so the core automation can keep running.
details.symptom: The research_shadow subsystem is creating repeated recovery noise.
details.why_it_matters: Quarantining a non-core subsystem keeps the trading pipeline available while isolating secondary failures.

details.decision: Force the effective operating mode to manual while recovery actions reduce pressure.

details.why_it_matters: Running the full automation stack under critical pressure risks unstable behavior.
